open_items.description: Confirm that the pilot's initial state snapshot is internally consistent and matches the declared boot manifest before any autonomous actions are permitted.
open_items.label: Verify initial state snapshot against boot manifest

response: Seed wake acknowledged. One bounded follow‑up item identified: verify that the autonomy pilot's initial state snapshot is consistent with the declared boot manifest. This item is now preserved as an open item and one wake has been scheduled to resolve it.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve open item oi-001: cross-check the initial state snapshot with the boot manifest and confirm consistency.
